---
name: Feature request
about: Request new functionality using the shardline issue format
title: "feat(scope): <request> — <goal>"
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Description

Clear explanation of the requested change and why it matters.

## Motivation

Business or operator motivation:

Technical motivation:

## Proposed change

- What should be added or changed
- Affected crates, commands, APIs, or deployment surfaces

## Scope and impact

- Affected crates or modules:
- Protocol or API impact:
- Backward compatibility:
- Performance impact:
- Security impact:

## Alternatives considered

- Existing workflows or smaller changes considered first

## Validation plan

- Tests to add:
- Manual validation to run:
- Benchmark or rollout checks if applicable:

## Related issues and documentation

- Related:
- Relevant docs:
- Additional context:
